title: Update game theme to traffic road setting with traffic obstacles

requirements.summary: Replace the current game background with a scrolling traffic road scene
acceptanceCriteria: Background displays a traffic road texture with lane markings
Road scrolls continuously from right to left matching game speed
Seamless infinite scrolling is maintained without visible seams

file_operations.description: Update the Background component to use the generated traffic road background image located at frontend/public/assets/generated/traffic-road-bg.dim_1920x600.png. Replace the current texture loader import path while maintaining the existing infinite scrolling logic with two planes that reposition seamlessly. Ensure the new texture is loaded correctly and the scrolling behavior remains smooth and continuous.

requirements.summary: Replace existing obstacle types with traffic-themed obstacles (cars and traffic cones)
acceptanceCriteria: Obstacle component supports 'car' and 'trafficCone' types instead of 'rock' and 'puddle'
Cars and traffic cones have appropriate sizes and textures
Collision detection works correctly with new obstacle types
Game over is triggered when Shinchan collides with traffic obstacles

file_operations.description: Replace obstacle types from 'rock' and 'puddle' to 'car' and 'trafficCone'. Update the texture imports to use the generated images at frontend/public/assets/generated/car-obstacle.dim_128x64.png for cars and frontend/public/assets/generated/traffic-cone.dim_64x64.png for traffic cones. Adjust the size mapping logic to use appropriate dimensions for each obstacle type (car: 1.28 x 0.64, trafficCone: 0.64 x 0.64). Maintain the existing scrolling behavior and off-screen callback functionality.

requirements.summary: Update obstacle spawning logic to spawn traffic-themed obstacles
acceptanceCriteria: Spawning logic randomly generates cars and traffic cones
Spawn rates and positions are appropriate for traffic road gameplay
Difficulty progression continues to work with new obstacle types

file_operations.description: Update the obstacle spawning logic in the spawnObstacle function to randomly generate 'car' and 'trafficCone' types instead of 'rock' and 'puddle'. Maintain the existing spawn rate timing and difficulty progression system. Ensure the spawned obstacles use the updated type names that match the modified Obstacle component.

Update the ObstacleType type definition to use 'car' and 'trafficCone' instead of 'rock' and 'puddle'. Ensure the hook's interface remains consistent with the updated obstacle types used throughout the game.
